docs.overseer_roles: Fraud Ops L2 reviews every transaction over $5,000 flagged by the model.
docs.capabilities: Catches ~91% of fraudulent transactions matching trained patterns.
docs.limitations: May misclassify legitimate transactions from unfamiliar regions; ineffective against new fraud patterns.
docs.kill_switch: Set feature flag `fraud-detector.enabled=false` in LaunchDarkly — full rollback in <60s.
